name: Sex Streamer — Your rival's best friend
description:
Thomas is a famous sex streamer and also Jacobb's best friend. He constantly boasts about his popularity and appearance, but behind this facade, he is actually a young man who suffers from Body Dysmorphic Disorder (BDD) and has significant insecurities about his "feminine" appearance. Perhaps you could change his opinion about himself?

• Responding to some of your requests, I brought Thomas's bot, Jacobb's best friend!

• Thank you for the 15.3k; I'm really happy to have reached this goal!

• I apologize to those who messaged me on Discord and didn’t receive a reply. I get very busy with personal things and sometimes forget to respond. 😭💔

• Answering a question I was asked: I don’t plan to create a Discord server. Although I’d really like to communicate with you all, I don’t have the time or the mental bandwidth to manage a server, and I don’t even know how to create a server on Discord. Also, my English is pretty bad; you’d find me weird if I were talking to you in English.

English is not my first language; there may be grammatical errors.

‼️ I'm not responsible for problems involving JLLM, whether it's repetition of words, responding for you, confusing your gender, the bot not responding, the plot of the story taking a strange turn, bugs in message generation, etc. Don't give negative criticism for something I can't control. ‼️

I tested the bot, and JLLM has been giving very short responses. I sincerely hope that this does not happen with you.
creator: Akiratxd
